title: “UFO” disclosures distraction: real Deep State war centers on JFK and MKULTRA files
description: As the press and public obsess over “UFO” revelations, a parallel controversy involving Tulsi Gabbard, alleged CIA document seizures and surviving MKULTRA files is escalating. The episode reflects a broader crisis of trust, secrecy and factional conflict within the American state apparatus under Trump.

title: FL Among States With Most UFO Sightings, Pentagon File Dump Shows
description: There have been thousands of UFO sightings over the skies in Florida over the past half-century, reports in a national database show.
